rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 27, 2014, Line 1: PLAINTIFF NAVEEN SINGHA'S Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement. Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:30 a.m. in department 603 before the Settlement Specialist Pang Ly. =(501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: LESLEY ANN CLEMENT AS TRUSTEE FOR THE CLEMENT TRUS et al VS. TRI COLDWELL BANKER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross-Defendant'S Motion For Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To The Order Signed And Filed On 8/20/14.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 27, 2014, Line 2: Cross-Defendant's Motion For Good Faith Settlement Pursuant To The Order Signed And Filed On 8/20/14. (THIS TENTATIVE IS ISSUED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY) GRANTED. Moving party met its burden. No opposition filed. Prevailing party prepare order. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of General And Special Demurrer To Cross-Complaintant'S Verified First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 27, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFFS MICKEY WONG and YIU CHEONG CONSTRUCTION CO INC.'S Motion In Support Of General And Special Demurrer To Cross-Complaintant's Verified First Amended Cross-Complaint. OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Cross-Complaint sufficiently alleges facts regarding legal and equitable ownership; delayed discovery and fiduciary relationship. Demurrer cannot lie as to only a part of a cause of action. Court's order regarding sufficiency of allegations in the complaint has no bearing on sufficiency of allegations in the Cross-Complaint. =(501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Reconsider And/Or Revoke Prior Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 27, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG'S Motion To Reconsider And/Or Revoke Prior Order. Continued to September 11, 2014 to be heard by the Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. =(501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 27, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden a show that any portion of the complaint is improper, false or immaterial. Court's order regarding sufficiency of allegations in the complaint has no bearing on sufficiency of allegations in the Cross-Complaint. =(501/LKS)

rulings.Case Title: ALLYSYN OVERTON VS. PATRICK LAKE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Requests, And For An Order Deeming The Matters Admitted In Defts Request For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 27, 2014, Line 4: PLAINTIFF ALLYSYN OVERTON'S Motion To Compel Discovery Requests, And For An Order Deeming The Matters Admitted In Defendant's Request For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions. No opposition filed. Defendant shall provide responses to Special Interrogatories and Request for Production within 10 days of notice of entry of order by personal service on Plaintiff counsel. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,600. =(501/LKS)
